name: Scallop Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until translucent.
2. Remove the onions from the pan.
3. Chop up the scallops and saute them in butter until lightly browned.
4. Add the onions, scallops, and potatoes to the boiling water.
5. Simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Stir in the scalded milk and simmer an additional 15 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, ideally at room temperature.
